name: hibot-static-site
title: Link-in-bio Page
description: A minimal link-in-bio landing page. Perfect for learning HTML, CSS, and JavaScript with zero build steps.
quickStart: Edit: Customize the links, colors, and content
Deploy: Push to GitHub Pages or Vercel

name: hibot-fastapi-starter
title: Text Toolkit
description: Your first backend server. A text processing API built with FastAPI — see how routes, requests, and responses work.
quickStart: Customize: Edit endpoints and add your own routes

name: hibot-flask-guestbook
title: Message Wall
description: Your first database. A guestbook app with Flask and SQLite — learn how to store and retrieve data.
quickStart: Add messages and watch them persist in the database

name: hibot-streamlit-tool
title: Study & Budget Planner
description: Pure Python UI without HTML/CSS. Streamlit turns Python scripts into interactive web apps — build study tools and calculators fast.
quickStart: Customize: Edit the Python code to add your own logic
Deploy: Use Streamlit Cloud or Vercel

name: hibot-python-cli
title: Terminal Flashcards
description: A command-line tool with zero dependencies. Learn file I/O, loops, and data structures by building a terminal game.
quickStart: Customize: Add your own questions, scoring logic, or features
